mapper.select: SELECT record_id, content_type, content_id, study_mode, summary FROM ielts_daily_plan_items WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND status != 'SKIPPED' ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_daily_plan_items WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND status != 'SKIPPED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_daily_plan_items WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_daily_plan_items ( id, plan_id, content_type, content_id, record_id, study_mode, status, summary, sort_order, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{item.planId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{item.contentType}, #{item.contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{item.recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{item.studyMode}, #{item.status}, #{item.summary}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.completedAt}, #{item.createdAt} )

INSERT INTO ielts_daily_plan_items ( id, plan_id, content_type, content_id, record_id, study_mode, status, summary, sort_order, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{planId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{contentType}, #{contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{studyMode}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{sortOrder}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (plan_id, content_type, content_id, study_mode) DO NOTHING
